title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.614 - Penalties may be imposed by ordinances for injuries to commission's property
text:
67.614.  Penalties may be imposed by ordinances for injuries to commission's property. — The legislative authority of any city or county in which property of a regional convention and visitors commission is situated shall have the power to enact ordinances imposing suitable penalties for the punishment of persons committing injury upon the properties of the commission, or the grounds thereof.
(L. 1984 S.B. 709 § 5) 
Effective 5-15-84
